Lines.FullText: On connect, an event packet is enqueued in the connection. This method schedules the

Elements.RawText: On connect, an event packet is enqueued in the connection. This method schedules the

Lines.FullText: `onPacketReceived` notification instead of invoking it on the same thread.

Elements.RawText: `onPacketReceived` notification instead of invoking it on the same thread.

Description.RawText:
*
     * On connect, an event packet is enqueued in the connection. This method schedules the
     * `onPacketReceived` notification instead of invoking it on the same thread.
